name: Aunt Susie's Noodle Kugel
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces spaghetti noodles, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients (except topping) together and pour into greased 13x9 pan.
2. Lay pineapple quarters decoratively on the top.
3. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
4. Sprinkle cinnamon and sugar mixture on top.
5. Bake for 30 minutes longer.
6. Serve warm or cold. Refrigerate leftovers.
